channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Judge orders Giuliani to hand over assets to Georgia election workers
item.description: Rudy Giuliani must turn over much of his property — his apartment in New York, the city that made him mayor, and other prized possessions — to two Georgia election workers who have sought for months to collect their massive defamation judgment, a federal judge ruled Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: North Carolina county surrounding Asheville overcounted Helene deaths by as many as 30, sheriff says
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — The North Carolina county that is home to Asheville overcounted deaths caused by Helene by as many as 30, according to a statement Tuesday from its sheriff’s office and data from the state, significantly reducing the death toll from the historic storm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Desperation amid search for survivors of an airstrike on a crowded area near major Beirut hospital
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — Nearly 16 hours after an Israeli airstrike hit across the street from Beirut’s main public hospital, rescuers were still removing debris Tuesday from the overcrowded slum area.
item.dc:creator: SARAH EL DEEB, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LIST: Waffles, pancakes recall expanded over potential listeria contamination
item.description: The recalled products were sold under multiple brand names across the entire country, the company says.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former Abercrombie & Fitch chief Mike Jeffries arrested on federal sex trafficking charges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Former Abercrombie & Fitch CEO Mike Jeffries, his romantic partner and a third man were arrested Tuesday on charges of luring men into drug-laced, outlandish and coercive sex parties held around the world by dangling the promise of modeling for the retailer's once-defining beefca
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ and CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Grieving families of seniors who died in a Georgia dock collapse say tragedy was preventable
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Regina Brinson heard a crack before the metal walkway gave way beneath her feet, plunging her into the water beneath the state-operated ferry dock on Georgia's Sapelo Island.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Asheville annual holiday tradition canceled due to Helene
item.description: ASHEVILLE, N.C. (WSPA) - An annual national holiday tradition that has taken place for over three decades in Asheville has been canceled due to the aftermath of Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Nikolette Miller, Fox 5

item.title: Trump and Harris seek Latino votes by touting their approach to the economy
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Both Kamala Harris and Donald Trump promoted economic policy Tuesday as their best chance to win Latino voters. But their approaches are very different.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: South Korea warns it can send arms to Ukraine after reports of North's troops in Russia
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — South Korea warned Tuesday it could consider supplying weapons to Ukraine in response to North Korea allegedly dispatching troops to Russia, as both North Korea and Russia denied the movements. NATO's secretary general said that would mark a “significant escalation.
item.dc:creator: HYUNG-JIN KIM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Harris, Trump favorability ratings among lowest for nominees since 1956: Gallup
item.description: Former President Dwight D. Eisenhower received the best favorability rating in Gallup’s 1956 poll, with 84 percent supporting him.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: 19-year-old woman found dead in oven in Canada Walmart
item.description: A Canadian Walmart store was closed for a third day Tuesday as police investigated the death of a woman whose body was found inside an oven.
item.dc:creator: Wil Day, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dolton mayor Tiffany Henyard dubbed 'America's worst mayor' running for reelection
item.description: The mayor of Dolton, Ill., Tiffany Henyard, is likely the most controversial mayor ever elected in the town of 20,000, facing multiple controversies.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Tears for Fears are in full bloom with a concert film, a live album, new songs and Vegas dates
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — When Tears for Fears hit the stage at Firstbank Amphitheater in Franklin, Tennessee, on July 11, 2023, there were no tears but some fears. “We walked on stage and I felt like a deer caught in the headlines,” says singer and guitarist Roland Orzabal, half of the duo.
item.dc:creator: MARK KENNEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Biden heaps praise on Slovenia PM for aiding release of Americans in major US-Russia prisoner swap
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden heaped praise on Slovenian Prime Minister Robert Golob on Tuesday for his role in the recent seven-nation prisoner swap that freed Americans Evan Gershkovich, Alsu Kurmasheva and Paul Whelan from Russian prison. The deal, completed in August, was the largest U.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: MLB wants the Tampa Bay Rays to play in the area if hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field is unfit
item.description: Major League Baseball hopes to find the Tampa Bay Rays a temporary home near their fanbase for the start of the 2025 season if their home field can't be repaired in time.
item.dc:creator: Curt Anderson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Pumpkin spice car wash raising money for families in need
item.description: A New England company is bringing everyone's favorite fall flavor somewhere unexpected: the car wash.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Turley, NewsNation

item.title: Delphi murders: Contentious cross examination of investigator marks Day 4 of testimony
item.description: DELPHI, Ind. – Tuesday’s testimony in the Delphi murders trial included contentious cross examination of the lead crime scene investigator. Richard Allen faces four counts of murder in connection with the February 2017 deaths of Abby Williams and Libby German near the Monon High Bridge.
item.dc:creator: Max Lewis, NewsNation

item.title: Republicans ramp up defensive strategy on abortion after midterm struggles
item.description: Republicans are kicking their defensive messaging on abortion into high gear, aiming to blunt Democrats’ attempts to paint them as extreme in the run-up to the election.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Mike Jeffries, former Abercrombie & Fitch CEO, arrested on federal sex trafficking charges
item.description: Former Abercrombie & Fitch CEO Michael Jeffries and two other men have been arrested on sex trafficking and interstate prostitution charges, a spokesperson for federal prosecutors said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Selena Quintanilla, Missy Elliot, Steven Spielberg and more honored by Biden
item.description: President Joe Biden on Monday honored acclaimed filmmakers, singers, writers and others who have made their mark on American culture, awarding the prestigious National Medals of Arts and National Humanities Medals to 39 recipients.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Senate Democrats running away from Harris in 'blue wall' states
item.description: Vulnerable Democratic Senate candidates in 'blue wall' states are distancing themselves from Vice President Harris.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: On Lake Erie, getting rid of problem algae starts with giving it less food
item.description: OREGON, Ohio (AP) — On a warm late-summer evening, a small speedboat motored across a pea-green stretch of Lake Erie past a beach where a child sat splashing and a pair of newlyweds waded for a portrait photographer.
item.dc:creator: JOSHUA A. BICKEL and PATRICK AFTOORA-ORSAGOS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judges reject GOP overseas ballot challenges in Michigan, North Carolina
item.description: State judges in Michigan and North Carolina on Monday rejected the Republican National Committee’s (RNC) separate challenges to certain overseas ballots in the key swing states.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas teacher charged for alleged sexual assault of underaged former student: police
item.description: A Texas teacher is facing charges over accusations she had a sexual relationship with a child off-campus over the summer. The school district placed her on administrative leave.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Broadway dancer Zelig Williams last seen with headshots: Mom
item.description: Zelig Williams was last seen Oct. 3 carrying professional headshots as he left his house, according to Williams' mom Kathy.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Bullets fly at Detroit apartment complex as two shot, one fatally, in drive-by shooting
item.description: A drive-by shooting on the east side of Detroit on Monday claimed the life of an 18-year-old, while also injuring a 19-year-old who was taken to the hospital in stable condition.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas man whose execution was halted doesn't appear at state Capitol after subpoena
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — A Texas man whose execution was halted and then called to testify at the state Capitol did not show up Monday over growing pushback from state leaders who have blasted lawmakers' last-ditch tactics to subpoena Robert Roberson and spare his life for now.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Hezbollah hiding more than $500M in gold, cash under hospital in Lebanon, IDF says
item.description: Israel on Monday said Hezbollah is hiding millions in gold and cash under a Lebanese hospital but will not target the building for attack.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL stadiums could lose $11 billion from climate threats by 2050: report
item.description: “This report is a wake-up call for the NFL, stadium owners, and local governments,” said Climate X CEO Lukky Ahmed.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Eyewitness video captures frantic efforts to save lives after deadly collapse of dock walkway
item.description: SAVANNAH, Ga. (AP) — The metal gangway where dozens of people waited to board a ferry boat made a loud, creaking noise before snapping in the middle amid panicked cries from those sent plunging into the water.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM and EMILY WAGSTER PETTUS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Starbucks releasing 'Wicked' drinks inspired by the upcoming film
item.description: Starbucks will also release a variety of tumblers and cold cups in vibrant shades of green, pink and gold starting Nov. 7 in select stores, while supplies last.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, NewsNation

item.title: PHOTOS: White House public tour gets makeover with 'reimagined' visitor experience
item.description: The White House public tour is getting an extreme makeover, with new digital exhibits, an expanded route and more access to rooms poised to be part of the "reimagined" experience for visitors.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Some Jewish voters in presidential swing states reconsider their longtime devotion to Democrats
item.description: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — For Rona Kaufman, the signs are everywhere that more Jews feel abandoned by the Democratic Party and may vote for Republican Donald Trump. It's in her Facebook feed.
item.dc:creator: MARC LEVY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Grandma who texted stranger for Thanksgiving announces breast cancer diagnosis
item.description: The Arizona grandmother who sent a text message to what she believed was her grandson’s phone number, inviting him over for Thanksgiving dinner nearly nine years ago, has announced her diagnosis of breast cancer.
item.dc:creator: Celeste Houmard, ABC 4

item.title: From showgirl feathers to shimmering chandeliers, casino kitsch finds new life
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Crystal chandeliers that once glimmered above a swanky lounge, bright blue costume feathers that cloaked shimmying showgirls, and fake palm trees that evoked a desert oasis are just some the artifacts making their way from the latest latest casino graveyards of Las Vegas into Sin Ci
item.dc:creator: RIO YAMAT, Associated Press, ABC 4
